title: Performance Making II
outline: This is an intermediate course that expands and extends the foundational skills in theatre and dance established in year one. The year-long course explores varying aspects of theatre and dance including applied performance and pedagogy and emphasizes application of skills. Fieldwork components may be included in the course.
lecture_times: See departmental timetable and official class schedule.
dp_requirements: Attendance at all classes, performances and rehearsals. Completion of all projects.
assessment: Coursework, classwork and in -house performances count 50% of the final mark; practical examination counts 50% of the final mark. In order to pass, students must obtain at least 50% in both of the above.
